title: learn numbers
rhyme:
Clap, clap, little hands, clap in a row,
Tap, tap, tiny toes, off we go!
Share your smile, bright and wide,
Friends together, side by side.
Zoom goes the toy car, round and round,
Happy giggles are the best sound.
Take a turn, then let it be,
Sharing makes it fun for three!
Build a tower, one, two, three,
Cheer for friends so happily,
Play, learn, laugh, in harmony!
rhyme_music_style_prompt: User Prompt: create kids cheerful rhyme that can help then to learn numbers. Create cheerful, child-safe instrumental nursery music for 60 seconds, with a soft, gentle intro (do not make the beginning too heavy), gentle percussion, playful marimba and ukulele textures, bright major-key harmony, steady 120 BPM groove, no vocals, smooth loop-friendly ending.

visual_style_guide.style: Cocomelon-like 3D cartoon animation, rounded forms, soft global illumination, bright pastel nursery palette
visual_style_guide.palette: sky blue, sunny yellow, candy pink, leaf green
visual_style_guide.camera_language: gentle dolly moves, medium and close shots, playful pacing
visual_style_guide.render_notes: clean toy-like materials, smooth shading, soft shadows, kid-friendly proportions

Style anchor: "3d animation cartoon", Cocomelon-like nursery-rhyme look; rounded preschool characters, bright pastel palette, soft daylight GI, clean toy-like textures. User Prompt: create stylized cartoon stylized cartoon children cheerful rhyme that can help then to learn numbers
Inside a bright playroom, two stylized cartoon toddlers clap rhythmically in sync, sunlight through windows, colorful toys in background, kid-safe props only.
